title: chrysanthemum nitidum
intro: Chrysanthemum nitidum, also known as the shining chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant native to China and other parts of Asia. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, headache, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum nitidum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Chrysanthemum nitidum is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
